capabilities_confirmed: OmegaRecord vs ReferenceField separation: historical fact vs functional field
RF created only from OmegaRecord; centers without Omega cannot have RF
morphogenetic event classification: aligned / expression_reinforcing / tensioned / orthogonal / contested_expression / residue_amplifying
RF strength + expression_state fluctuate (active/contested/inexpressed); OmegaRecord remains immutable
two coagulated centers produce OmegaFieldInteraction trace; centers without Omega cannot enter Omega-field
omega_field interaction never creates Omega on a third co-active center; threshold rule still required
priority_only mode surfaces RF events as advisory feedback (rf_aligned, rf_contested_expression, rf_residue_amplifying, omega_field_resonance, omega_field_interference)
no epistemic override: slot_event zones stay intact through any RF activity
persist/load roundtrips RF + events + omega_field_interactions (payload v0.6.0)
limitations_remaining: no self-application loop: feedback is still inspectable metadata, no autonomous queue mutation
no first-class RelationRegistry: relation candidates remain ephemeral RelationCandidate items
field_vector is hybrid Phi_s + delta_X blend; not pure semantic embedding (no learned representation)
omega_field interaction only between co-active pairs; no temporal cross-episode aggregation
in-episode aggregation still flattens within-episode observations into one delta_X per center
notes: First version where memory becomes INTERNAL FORM. OmegaRecord = irreversible fact, ReferenceField = derived functional field that reads future events. The system can now classify alignment / contestation / residue against past coagulations without altering truth or memory.
